twitter_thread: 71% of Prime Day fitness equipment buyers ditch their purchases within 90 days. $1.2m in sales, down the drain.
Peloton's maintenance costs $420/yr, NordicTrack's costs $294/yr. That's a 30% difference.
55% of home gym owners prioritize space-saving design. The XTERRA Fitness folding treadmill is a top choice.
Measuring your workout space can save you $200. Don't buy before checking your ceiling height.
Amazon's top 10 fitness equipment has an average weight capacity of 297 lbs. Check your specs before buying.
The YOSUDA exercise bike has a 4.5-star rating, but its customer support has a 2.1-star rating. Buyer beware.
What's the one feature you can't compromise on when choosing home gym equipment? #fitnessequipment #homegym
pack.linkedin: On Prime Day, $1.2m in fitness equipment was sold in 1 hour, but 71% of buyers will abandon their purchases within 90 days. What features do you prioritize when selecting equipment for your home gym?
